name: Paul Peter
headline: Software Engineer & Web Developer
subtext: I build functional software and responsive websites.

about.content:
I am Paul Peter, also known as **Asterixh**. I am a Software Engineer and Web Developer with 4 years of experience. I focus on building software that works and websites that are easy to use.

I have built over 15 projects, including custom tools for 6 different clients. While I recently focus on high-performance professional websites, my technical depth is best seen in projects like **Anonfly** (an encrypted messaging platform), **SMS** (a full-stack School Management System), and **Quizeen** (an interactive quiz engine). I write clean code and I deliver what is needed.

hero.quote: Creating digital experiences that blend creativity with functionality, delivering solutions that drive results.
